en_title: Xbox Game Pass Shed 'Millions of Subscribers' Following October 2025 Price Hike
cn_title: Xbox Game Pass涨价后流失数百万订阅用户
subtitle: 涨价50%的代价
opus_summary: 微软首席战略官Matthew Ball透露，2025年10月Game Pass涨价50%后，数月内流失数百万订阅用户。Ultimate月费从19.99美元(约合人民币136元)涨至29.99美元(约合人民币204元)后降至22.99美元(约合人民币156元)。作为补偿，微软取消《使命召唤》首发入库。目前订阅服务已恢复增长。

paragraphs.en: Microsoft says Xbox Game Pass lost "millions of subscribers" after it increased prices by 50% with a price hike in October 2025.
paragraphs.cn: 微软表示，Xbox Game Pass在2025年10月涨价50%后，流失了「数百万订阅用户」。

paragraphs.en: Xbox chief strategy officer Matthew Ball relayed the damage during a live taping with The Game Business today. The Game Awards and Summer Game Fest host Geoff Keighley was in attendance and shared his words on social media today. GameSpot also shared an extended version of Microsoft executive's quote.
paragraphs.cn: Xbox首席战略官Matthew Ball今天在The Game Business的现场录制中透露了这一损失。TGA和夏日游戏节主持人Geoff Keighley出席了活动，并在社交媒体上分享了Ball的发言。GameSpot也发布了微软高管的更完整引述。

paragraphs.en: "We shed millions of subscribers over the span of a few months," Ball said.
paragraphs.cn: 「我们在几个月内流失了数百万订阅用户，」Ball说道。

paragraphs.en: The exact number of subscribers Xbox Game Pass lost was not revealed, but "millions" makes it sound like the gaming subscription service took a substantial hit. The exact number of subscribers Microsoft had in early 2026 vs. today is unclear, but we do know it had at least 34 million users subscribed as of February 2024 . By July 2025, Xbox Game Pass revenue had reportedly reached nearly $5 billion for the first time.
paragraphs.cn: Xbox Game Pass流失的具体用户数并未公布，但「数百万」这个说法表明这项游戏订阅服务遭受了重创。微软在2026年初与现在的具体订阅人数尚不明确，但我们知道截至2024年2月，其订阅用户至少为3400万。到2025年7月，Xbox Game Pass收入据称首次接近50亿美元（约合人民币358亿元）。

paragraphs.en: Game Pass seemed to be a go-to place for Xbox fans across Xbox One, Xbox Series X | S, and Xbox on PC, but that took a hit when price hikes were announced late last year. Microsoft began October 2025 by confirming a monthly subscription for its Xbox Game Pass Ultimate tier would rise from $19.99 to a whopping $29.99 . It was a 50% increase, bringing prices to $120 per year.
paragraphs.cn: Game Pass曾是Xbox One、Xbox Series X|S和PC端Xbox玩家的首选，但去年年底宣布涨价后，这一地位受到了冲击。微软在2025年10月初确认，Xbox Game Pass Ultimate月费将从19.99美元（约合人民币143元）大幅上涨至29.99美元（约合人民币215元）。涨幅高达50%，年费达到120美元（约合人民币859元）。

paragraphs.en: Although the decision came with the promise of more big games, such as Hogwarts Legacy, as well as other benefits, current subscribers were far from impressed. Fans quickly took to social media en masse to announce they would be canceling their subscriptions . At the time, it was unclear if that movement was doing anything to push Microsoft into walking back the decision. Now, it definitely sounds like the Xbox company felt that hit.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管这一决定伴随着更多大作（如《霍格沃茨之遗》）和其他福利的承诺，但现有订阅用户并不买账。粉丝们迅速在社交媒体上集体宣布将取消订阅。当时，尚不清楚这一运动是否促使微软收回决定。现在，听起来Xbox确实感受到了冲击。

paragraphs.en: Ball said that Microsoft "corrected that offering" when it announced it would slash the price of Xbox Game Pass Ultimate from $29.99 a month to $22.99. It was a mostly unexpected price decrease that offered a change of pace after years of incrimental increases, both for Game Pass and consoles . Although the new, current price of Game Pass is still $3 more expensive than the pre-hike price, Ball noted the service's "value has changed."
paragraphs.cn: Ball表示，微软在宣布将Xbox Game Pass Ultimate月费从29.99美元（约合人民币215元）降至22.99美元（约合人民币165元）时，「纠正了该方案」。这是一次出乎意料的价格下调，在Game Pass和主机多年来的渐进式涨价后带来了节奏变化。尽管Game Pass当前的新价格仍比涨价前高出3美元（约合人民币21元），但Ball指出该服务的「价值已经改变」。

paragraphs.en: As part of the trade-off, Microsoft confirmed rumors that it would be pulling Call of Duty games from the service's day-one release plan. That part of the bargain is one that Ball specifically said users have appreciated.
paragraphs.cn: 作为交换的一部分，微软证实了传言，即它将把《使命召唤》游戏从服务的首发入库计划中移除。Ball特别指出，用户对这一安排表示赞赏。

paragraphs.en: Meanwhile, Sharma recently commented on Microsoft's Xbox Game Pass strategy during a recent interview with Bloomberg . During the conversation, she said the company has "been
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，Sharma最近在接受彭博社采访时评论了微软的Xbox Game Pass策略。在对话中，她表示公司「已经

paragraphs.en: able to reset Game Pass after an eight-month decline."
paragraphs.cn: 能够在八个月的下降后重置Game Pass。」

paragraphs.en: "It’s now returned to growth and expanding retention," she added, "and most importantly, we're starting to get back to being closer to our players and our community."
paragraphs.cn: 「它现在已经恢复增长，留存率也在扩大，」她补充道，「最重要的是，我们开始重新拉近与玩家和社区的距离。」

paragraphs.en: Meanwhile, Microsoft leadership is still winding down after delivering its Xbox Games Showcase 2026 and Gears of War: E-Day Direct, yesterday. The event saw it announce a number of new projects, includinga a new Spyro: A Realm Beyond , Persona 6 , and more. You can see everything announced at the show here .
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，微软领导层在昨天举办了Xbox Games Showcase 2026和《战争机器：事变日》直面会后，仍在收尾。发布会上公布了一系列新项目，包括新作《斯派罗：超越之境》（Spyro: A Realm Beyond）、《女神异闻录6》等。你可以在这里查看发布会上公布的所有内容。
